text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I didn't even manage to place.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So this is it... This is the extent of my skills right
now.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list: We'll rise up the ranks from here!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list: We'll rise up the ranks from here!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's clear I'm not good enough right now. Just
knowing that is a gain.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: In that case, I just have to run more until I am good enough. It's as simple as that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The next race is already near. Let's go back so I
can get to training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I seem to have helped Admire Vega improve her
mood!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That isn't an option to me—not since that day I
decided to carry out this duty.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If I'm too slow now, I'll need to keep on running
to get faster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega's eyes are calm, but an intense spirit
shines through. It seems my words reached her!
